headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -62.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 136% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 157 quotes and 119 at strong intensity, driving a high score of 71.2 — people are venting forcefully today.
• At 71.2, frustrations sit in the upper half of their 184-day range (−0.5 to 171.4), making this an elevated but not exceptional day.
• Fears dropped sharply from 6.6 to −7.0, while optimism flipped from negative to slightly positive — both quieter categories are moving in a calmer direction.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
